description:
compile_fn currently takes &mut JITModule. Change to <M: cranelift_module::Module>. The body should already be Module-agnostic; this is mostly a signature change plus generic call sites.

## Acceptance

- cargo test green.
- compile_fn signature shows the generic bound.
- No new behavior.
title: Parameterize compile_fn on M: cranelift_module::Module
